fields.name: Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of resource for which the alternate unit price is valid.

fields.name: Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the resource code for which the alternate unit price is valid.

fields.name: Work Type Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies which work type the resource applies to. Prices are updated based on this entry.

fields.name: Currency Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the currency code that the alternate unit price is in.

fields.name: Current Unit Price
fields.tooltip: Specifies the alternate unit price of the resource.

fields.name: New Unit Price
fields.tooltip: Specifies the new unit price that is valid for the selected combination of resource type, resource code, project number, or work type.
